matchups.rivalryDescription: The greatest rivalry in South American football - Brazil's flair vs Argentina's passion

worldCupHistory.result: Both reached final four - Argentina won tournament
worldCupHistory.details: Brazil eliminated by Croatia in QF; Argentina won final

worldCupHistory.result: Did not meet - Brazil lost to Germany 7-1 before potential meeting
worldCupHistory.details: Would have met in final if both won semi-finals

worldCupHistory.result: Did not meet - both eliminated before potential meeting
worldCupHistory.details: Brazil lost to Netherlands; Argentina lost to Germany
Maradona assist to Caniggia; Only World Cup meeting

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Argentina's first major trophy since 1993; Messi's first with Argentina
Brazil dominated in Venezuela
Brazil won on penalties in Peru

matchups.overallEdge: Historically even - Brazil slight edge in wins, Argentina recent Copa América success
funFacts: Only met once in World Cup history (1990)
Argentina ended 28-year trophy drought by beating Brazil in 2021 Copa América final at Maracanã
Pelé vs Maradona debate has defined this rivalry for decades
Now Messi vs Neymar continues the tradition

matchups.rivalryName: Dos a Cero / El Clásico de Concacaf
matchups.rivalryDescription: The defining North American rivalry - heated battles for regional supremacy

worldCupHistory.details: USA lost to Netherlands; Mexico lost to Argentina

worldCupHistory.result: USA advanced, Mexico also advanced but different bracket
worldCupHistory.details: Both made knockout stage for first time in same tournament

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: First ever Nations League title; Pulisic heroics
USA won 7th Gold Cup
Mexico wins 8th Gold Cup
Start of famous 'Dos a Cero' result in Columbus
First 'Dos a Cero' - ended Mexico's 24-match home qualifying streak

matchups.overallEdge: Mexico historically dominant, but USA has closed gap significantly in 2000s-2020s
funFacts: 'Dos a Cero' - USA's famous 2-0 scoreline vs Mexico in Columbus happened 4 times (2001, 2005, 2009, 2013)
Both nations will co-host World Cup 2026 with Canada
Mexico has never lost to USA in World Cup (they've never met)
USA has won more Gold Cups (7) than Mexico (8) since 2000
Rivalry intensified after USA's shock 2-0 win in 2002 World Cup Round of 16... wait, they didn't play. But the rivalry is still intense!

matchups.rivalryDescription: European giants with contrasting styles - German efficiency vs French flair

worldCupHistory.details: Hummels header; Germany went on to win tournament
Germany advanced to final vs Argentina

worldCupHistory.result: West Germany 3-3 France (Germany won 5-4 on penalties)
worldCupHistory.details: One of greatest World Cup matches ever; Schumacher's brutal foul on Battiston; Germany came from 3-1 down in extra time

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: France eliminated Germany on home soil
Friendly during Paris attacks - game continued for safety
Just Fontaine scored 4 goals; highest scoring third-place match

matchups.overallEdge: Germany holds edge in World Cup meetings (3-0); France leads overall head-to-head
funFacts: 1982 Semi-Final is considered one of greatest World Cup matches ever
Harald Schumacher's brutal foul on Patrick Battiston in 1982 went unpunished - one of World Cup's most controversial moments
Germany has eliminated France in World Cup semis twice (1982, 1986)
France got revenge in Euro 2016 semi-finals on German soil
Both nations have won 2 World Cups each in modern era

matchups.rivalryDescription: Historic rivalry dating back to 1966 World Cup final - England's glory vs Germany's dominance

worldCupHistory.details: Lampard's 'ghost goal' not given; Germany dominated; England's worst World Cup defeat

worldCupHistory.result: West Germany 1-1 England (Germany won 4-3 on penalties)
worldCupHistory.details: Gazza's tears; Waddle and Pearce missed penalties; Germany reached final
England's only World Cup title; Geoff Hurst hat-trick; controversial 'goal that never was'

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: England finally beat Germany in knockout match after 55 years
Southgate missed crucial penalty; Germany went on to win Euros at Wembley
England's greatest ever win in Germany; Michael Owen hat-trick

matchups.overallEdge: Germany dominant in modern knockout matches; England holds 1966 glory
funFacts: England's only World Cup title came against Germany in 1966 final
Geoff Hurst's controversial 'goal that never was' decided 1966 final - ball may not have crossed line
England has lost to Germany in 3 penalty shootouts (1990 WC, 1996 Euros, but won in 2021 Euros without penalties)
Lampard's 'ghost goal' in 2010 was clear but not given - FIFA introduced goal-line technology after this
Germany has eliminated England from World Cup/Euros 4 times; England has eliminated Germany twice (1966 WC, 2021 Euros)

matchups.rivalryDescription: Fierce neighbors competing for Iberian supremacy - la Roja vs Seleção

worldCupHistory.details: Ronaldo hat-trick including last-minute free kick; One of greatest individual World Cup performances; Classic match
David Villa goal; Spain went on to win tournament

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Spain went on to win Euro 2012 for unprecedented 3rd straight major trophy
Portugal went on to reach final as host nation

notableNonWorldCupMatches.result: France 3-2 Portugal (after France 3-2 Spain in another semi)
notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Both Iberian teams eliminated by eventual winners France

matchups.overallEdge: Spain holds edge in both World Cup meetings and overall record
funFacts: Ronaldo's hat-trick vs Spain in 2018 is one of greatest individual World Cup performances
Both nations share Iberian Peninsula but fierce rivals
Spain won 3 straight major trophies (Euro 2008, WC 2010, Euro 2012) while Portugal struggled
Portugal finally won Euro 2016, their first major trophy
Messi vs Ronaldo rivalry has extended to national team level with these neighbors

matchups.rivalryDescription: Total Football vs German Efficiency - neighbors with deep historical and footballing rivalry

worldCupHistory.details: Rijkaard spat on Völler; Both sent off; Bitter match
Cruyff's Netherlands lost despite being favorites; Germany won on home soil; Total Football defeated

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Van Basten's revenge; Netherlands went on to win Euro 88; Only major tournament win for Netherlands
Germany topped group; Netherlands eliminated without a win

matchups.overallEdge: Germany has won both World Cup meetings; Netherlands got revenge in Euro 1988
funFacts: 1974 Final - Netherlands' 'Total Football' lost to German pragmatism despite being favorites
1988 Euros - Van Basten's revenge as Netherlands beat Germany in semi-finals
Rivalry has historical roots beyond football (WWII occupation)
Netherlands has never beaten Germany in World Cup
Both teams eliminated each other in major tournaments: Germany (1974 WC, 1990 WC), Netherlands (1988 Euros)

matchups.rivalryDescription: Political tensions meet football drama - defined by Maradona's 'Hand of God' and 'Goal of the Century'

worldCupHistory.details: Beckham penalty; Revenge for 1998
Beckham sent off; Batty and Ince missed penalties
Maradona's 'Hand of God' and 'Goal of the Century' in same match; Argentina won tournament

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Argentina's Rattin sent off; England went on to win tournament

matchups.overallEdge: Argentina leads World Cup meetings 2-1; Falklands War adds political dimension
funFacts: 1986 - Maradona's 'Hand of God' and 'Goal of the Century' both in same match
'Hand of God' - Maradona punched ball into net, referee didn't see it
'Goal of the Century' - 5 minutes later, Maradona dribbled past entire England team
Falklands War (1982) adds political tension to rivalry
England has never beaten Argentina in World Cup knockout stage

matchups.rivalryDescription: Most successful World Cup nations - Brazil's samba style vs German machine

worldCupHistory.details: Brazil's worst ever defeat; 'Mineirazo'; Germany scored 5 goals in 18 minutes; Humiliation on home soil
Ronaldo scored twice; Brazil's 5th title
Brazil's 5th World Cup

notableNonWorldCupMatches.significance: Brazil finally won Olympic gold; Neymar's redemption after 7-1

matchups.overallEdge: Brazil leads overall; Germany has devastating 7-1 in 2014
funFacts: 7-1 - Brazil's worst ever World Cup defeat on home soil in semi-finals
Germany scored 5 goals in 18 minutes in the 7-1 match
'Mineirazo' - traumatic defeat named after Mineirão stadium
Both nations have combined 9 World Cup titles (Brazil 5, Germany 4)
Brazil got small revenge by winning 2016 Olympics final on penalties
